failed_attempts.sql:
WITH recent_comments AS (
  SELECT c.annotation, p.id AS profile_id
  FROM comment c
  JOIN publication p ON c.publication_id = p.id
  JOIN profile pr ON c.profile_id = pr.id
  WHERE pr.username = 'fluminensefc'
  AND c.published_at >= NOW() - INTERVAL '1 week'
)
SELECT DISTINCT c.annotation AS comment, c.profile_id FROM recent_comments c
ORDER BY ts_rank(c.annotation_lexemes, to_tsquery('english', 'crisis | complaints')) DESC
LIMIT 10;
